parsed_review.summary: CP00-523 is a clean descriptor-only pack for the RP17.P02.M06 Synthetic Fixture Set slice (10 units, RP17.P02.M06.S06-S15, risk A). The pack-level claims are fully supported by independent read-only inspection. Identity and binding fields are consistent across the manifest, registry.js (AI_GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP523_PACK_BINDING), the contract current_pack/p02_fixture_slice_descriptor/historical_pack_bindings tail, and the plan summary (upstream CP00-522, next CP00-524, next subphase RP17.P02.M06.S16, flag ai_governance_core_p02_fixture_slice_descriptor_verified). Deliverable distribution (security_audit 1 + implementation 5 + ui 3 + claude_review 1 = 10) matches the included-unit titles and CP523_REQUIREMENTS. The production_ready claim is NOT overstated: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review; the descriptor_verified flag is a descriptor marker, not a runtime/enterprise-trust claim, and no production_ready gate is weakened. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced at the row level, in freezeCp523Result, the top-level and descriptor no_write_attestation, and the contract projection; ROW_EXTRAS add only benign descriptor metadata. The authority boundary correctly keeps Claude a read-only reviewer (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, tools Read/Grep/Glob), and Hermes is used only for deterministic evidence-packet/receipt shapes (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Review-hardening artifacts conform to CP178+: auth preflight passed (exit 0, non-zero valid-JSON stdout), prompt 2150B within limit, no forbidden tools, summary-only review correctly prohibited. command-evidence records all 27 build/test/validate gates at exit 0. The only open item is the expected pre-review absence of the post-review evidence files (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json), which the documented gated post-review commands generate before commit. No P0/P1/P2 issues found.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts not yet present (expected pre-review state)
findings.details: manifest.required_pack_artifacts and evidence_refs list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-523/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist in the pack directory. This is the expected state at the read_only_claude_run step of the hardening sequence: command-evidence.json (notes) explicitly defers closeout-pack:validate and the normalize/receipt/adjudication/inspection artifacts to the post-review gated commands executed before commit. Not a defect in the delivered descriptor implementation.
findings.recommendation: Ensure the gated post-review steps (normalize, receipt:validate, finding_adjudication, construction_inspection, closeout-pack:validate) generate claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json before the closeout commit, so the manifest's required_pack_artifacts resolve. No change to the pack implementation is required.
